title: Security Alert
message: Heavy rain expected in 15 mins. Please move to covered areas near the Food Court.

title: Crowd Warning
message: Stage 1 is currently at 90% capacity. Consider heading to Stage 3 for more space.

title: Stay Hydrated!
message: It's 28°C. Remember to drink water. Nearest fountain is 50m behind you.

title: Friend Request
message: João wants to join your circle. Accept to see their location on the map.

title: Show Ending
message: The performance at the Acoustic Tent is finishing. Check the schedule for what's next!

title: Lost & Found
message: A set of keys was turned in near your last location. Check the Info Point.
